rationale: The cited paper appears only once in the main text, in a grouped parenthetical list of prior marketing applications of a rank-order binomial mapping. In that passage, the citing paper uses Rost (1985) as the core methodological source and lists Ying, Feinberg, and Wedel (2006) as one example among others, without discussing its findings, model details, or specific contribution. There is no clear evidence that this specific paper materially shapes the citing paper's hypotheses, empirical design, or interpretation beyond background precedent.
